name: TAIBET EL-IMAM PHARMACIES
description: This website will make it easy for you to obtain comprehensive and up-to-date information about the pharmacies on duty in the city of Taibat Al-Imam, where you can view each pharmacy, its detailed addresses, and its phone numbers for communication and inquiries, in addition to identifying the nearest pharmacy on duty to you easily and conveniently, which saves you the effort in searching for medicine in emergency cases.
